login.welcome_prompt: welcome to Realm. type your character's name and press enter.
login.no_such: no character named '{name}'. ask the admin to create one with @create-player.
error.unknown_command: unknown command: {verb}. type 'help' for a list.
error.command_failed: something went wrong running that command.
error.admin_only: admin commands are not available to you.
look.player_other: {name} is here, an adventurer like yourself.
give.to_self: you can't give something to yourself.
cast.unknown: you don't know any spell named '{query}'.
cast.no_mp: you don't have enough mana ({mp} required).
cast.cant: you can't cast it that way.
cast.bad_target: you can't cast that on them.
cast.needs_hostile: that spell needs a hostile target.
heal.no_effect: the healing magic finds nothing to mend.
take.already_known: you already know how to wear {item}.
wear.unknown: you don't know how to wear '{query}'.
combat.you_respawn: you wake at home, weakened but alive.
use.cant: you can't use that like that.
admin.created: created character '{name}' (lang: {lang}). they can now log in.
admin.reloaded: reloaded {rooms} rooms, {npcs} NPC defs (respawned), strings reloaded.
help.text:
commands:
  look [target]                describe surroundings or someone
  n s e w u d  (or names)      move through an exit
  go <exit>                    move through a named exit
  say <text>   ("<text>)       speak to the room
  emote <text> (:<text>)       perform an action
  hug/pet/pat/wave/scratch/    social actions; e.g. 'pet dog'
    smile/bow <target>
  take <item>                  pick up an item from the ground
  drop <item>                  drop an item from your inventory
  inventory (i)                list what you carry
  give <item> to <target>      hand an item to someone
  use <item> [on <target>]     use an item, optionally on someone
  cast <spell> [on <target>]   cast a known spell, optionally on someone
  attack <target> (kill/hit)   attack an NPC
  flee (f)                     flee through a random exit
  wear <item>                  put on a known wearable (also: equip)
  remove <item>                take off a wearable (also: unwear)
  equipment (eq)               show your equipment
  who                          list players online
  lang [code]                  show or set your language (en|cs)
  help                         show this list
  quit                         disconnect

admin:
  @create-player <name> [lang] create a new character
  @reload                      reload world content from disk
  @who                         list players online with locations
